days.summary: Introduced a substantial workflow feature set across the codebase workspace, adding workflow APIs, manager and WebSocket hooks, multi-tab WorkflowCenter UI, orchestration controls, status components, clarification chat UI, workflow type definitions, formatter utilities, and integration documentation.
frontendChangeBullets: Introduced a dedicated WorkflowCenter experience that gives users a central place to coordinate multi-step codebase work from planning through execution.
Added multi-tab workflow screens so users can move between design, progress, status, and supporting views without losing workflow context.
Added real-time workflow status components that make active orchestration progress easier to scan while work is running.
Introduced clarification chat UI so workflows can pause for user decisions and collect missing context directly inside the workspace.
Added formatter utilities and typed workflow display data so workflow details appear more consistently across tabs, panels, and status views.
backendChangeBullets: Added workflow API foundations for creating, tracking, and coordinating structured codebase workflows across the application.
Introduced workflow manager logic to centralize orchestration state and keep workflow progress aligned with the UI.
Added WebSocket-based workflow hooks so runtime status updates can stream into the workspace in near real time.
Defined workflow types that standardize workflow stages, status payloads, and orchestration data exchanged between layers.
Added integration documentation and supporting utilities to make the new workflow system easier to connect with existing workspace operations.

days.summary: Refined workflow design behavior by updating the WorkflowDesignTab and WorkflowContext, focusing on bug fixes in workflow state or design-stage handling after the initial workflow feature landing.
frontendChangeBullets: Refined the WorkflowDesignTab so users editing or reviewing a workflow plan see steadier stage behavior.
Improved workflow design interactions to reduce friction when moving through design-stage content.
Made the design-stage experience more predictable by tightening how selected workflow state is reflected in the tab.
Reduced confusing UI transitions that could occur after the initial workflow feature set landed.
Polished the workflow design surface so plan review feels more stable during iterative changes.
backendChangeBullets: Adjusted WorkflowContext state handling so design-stage data is tracked more reliably across workflow operations.
Fixed workflow state behavior that could leave design-stage information out of sync with the active workflow view.
Strengthened the context layer that coordinates workflow design state for downstream UI consumers.
Improved reliability of workflow stage handling after the initial orchestration system was introduced.
Reduced edge cases in workflow context updates that could affect how design-stage state propagates through the app.

days.summary: Stabilized workflow and configuration surfaces with fixes spanning workflow API handling, workflow stage hooks, real-time and planner UI, stage confirmation chat items, clarification UI, workspace input handling, and configuration pages for agents and integrations.
frontendChangeBullets: Polished real-time workflow screens so users can follow status updates and stage changes with less ambiguity.
Improved planner views to better reflect current workflow progress and stage-specific activity.
Enhanced stage confirmation chat items so workflow decisions are presented more clearly inside the conversation.
Refined clarification UI to make follow-up questions and required user input easier to understand.
Fixed agent and integration configuration pages so related settings surfaces behave more consistently.
backendChangeBullets: Improved workflow API handling to make workflow operations more reliable across stage changes and planner interactions.
Stabilized workflow stage hooks so stage tracking remains consistent while workflows advance.
Strengthened real-time workflow update handling for screens that depend on live orchestration state.
Improved workspace input handling around workflow-related decisions and confirmation flows.
Fixed configuration logic for agent and integration surfaces so saved options and runtime behavior stay better aligned.

days.summary: Fixed repeated stage switching in the workflow experience by adjusting WorkflowDesignTab behavior and significantly refactoring WorkflowContext state handling.
frontendChangeBullets: Fixed repeated workflow stage switching so users remain on the intended step instead of being bounced between stages.
Refined the WorkflowDesignTab to make the active design stage clearer and less disruptive during review.
Improved the workflow design experience by reducing unexpected stage transitions in the UI.
Made workflow navigation feel more predictable when users are editing or inspecting a plan.
Reduced visual confusion caused by repeated stage changes in the workflow design surface.
backendChangeBullets: Refactored WorkflowContext state handling to prevent repeated stage switching from being triggered by context updates.
Improved workflow state coordination so stage selection remains stable across design interactions.
Tightened the logic that connects workflow context updates to the currently active workflow stage.
Reduced context-level state churn that could cause confusing workflow stage transitions.
Strengthened the workflow state model behind the design experience for more predictable orchestration behavior.

days.summary: Applied a small workspace bug fix touching real-time operation display, the left work-on panel, and the main workspace container.
frontendChangeBullets: Fixed workspace panel issues affecting how real-time operation activity is displayed to users.
Improved the left work-on panel so the active work context is presented more reliably.
Polished the main workspace container for a steadier day-to-day workspace experience.
Reduced UI inconsistencies between the operation display and the surrounding workspace panels.
Improved active-work visibility so users can more easily understand what the workspace is currently focused on.
backendChangeBullets: Adjusted the data flow behind real-time operation display so workspace panels receive more reliable state.
Improved coordination between the left work-on panel and main workspace container state.
Fixed a small workspace behavior issue that affected how active operation context propagated through the app.
Strengthened runtime state handling for workspace operation views without changing the overall workflow model.
Reduced edge-case inconsistencies in workspace container logic tied to real-time operation presentation.
